from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import shutil
import sys
from pathlib import Path

PROFILES = {"backend", "frontend", "infrastructure", "batch"}


def _plan(source_root: Path, target: Path, profile: str) -> list[tuple[Path, bytes]]:
    if profile not in PROFILES:
        raise ValueError(f"unknown profile: {profile}")
    wrapper = (
        "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n"
        "from pathlib import Path\n"
        "import runpy\n"
        "root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent\n"
        "runpy.run_path(str(root / '.agents/skills/generate-implementation-design/scripts/designflow.py'), run_name='__main__')\n"
    ).encode("utf-8")
    config = (
        "schema_version: designflow-config/v1.0\n"
        "projects:\n"
        "  - id: application\n"
        "    root: .\n"
        f"    profiles: [{profile}]\n"
        "    adapters: []\n"
        f"    required_capabilities: []\n"
        "    output: docs/design/generated/application\n"
    ).encode("utf-8")
    source_skill = source_root / ".agents/skills/generate-implementation-design"
    adopt_skill = source_root / ".agents/skills/adopt-implementation-design"
    files: list[tuple[Path, bytes]] = [
        (target / "designflow.yaml", config),
        (target / "designflow", wrapper),
    ]
    for source_directory in (source_skill, adopt_skill):
        for path in sorted(source_directory.rglob("*")):
            if not path.is_file() or "__pycache__" in path.parts:
                continue
            relative = path.relative_to(source_root)
            files.append((target / relative, path.read_bytes()))
    return files


def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Canonical Design IR delivery adopter")
    parser.add_argument("--source-root", default=".")
    parser.add_argument("--target", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--profile", choices=sorted(PROFILES), required=True)
    mode = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
    mode.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true")
    mode.add_argument("--apply", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)

    source_root = Path(args.source_root).resolve()
    target = Path(args.target).resolve()
    target.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    plan = _plan(source_root, target, args.profile)
    existing = [path for path, _ in plan if path.exists()]
    report = {
        "schema_version": "designflow-adoption/v1.0",
        "profile": args.profile,
        "mode": "dry-run" if args.dry_run else "apply",
        "files": [path.relative_to(target).as_posix() for path, _ in plan],
        "conflicts": [path.relative_to(target).as_posix() for path in existing],
    }
    if args.apply and existing:
        print(
            "adoption refuses to overwrite existing paths: "
            + ", ".join(path.relative_to(target).as_posix() for path in existing),
            file=sys.stderr,
        )
        return 2
    if args.apply:
        for path, content in plan:
            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            path.write_bytes(content)
            if path.name == "designflow":
                path.chmod(path.stat().st_mode | 0o111)
    print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, indent=2))
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
